translation: * Byasubiririjwe kugeza ku gihembo cya hafi

source: Cannot delete tag — {0} entries use it.
Do you want to sync all unsynced time entries to ERPNext now?
translation: Urashaka guhuza ibyanditswe by'igihe byose bidahurijwe kuri ERPNext nonaha?

source: Entries older than {0} days are locked. Contact your administrator.
translation: Ibyanditswe bishaje iminsi {0} bifunze. Vugana n'umuyobozi wawe.

source: ERPNext is not installed on this site.
translation: ERPNext ntabwo yashyizweho kuri uru rubuga.

source: ERPNext is reachable and Timesheet access is confirmed.
translation: ERPNext iragerwaho kandi kwinjira mu rupapuro rw'igihe byemejwe.

source: ERPNext Timesheet {0} for {1} is submitted — re-sync blocked.
translation: Irupapuro rw'igihe rya ERPNext {0} (rya {1}) ryoherejwe — guhuza bundi byahagaritswe.

source: ERPNext Timesheet is submitted — re-sync blocked
translation: Irupapuro rw'igihe rya ERPNext ryoherejwe — guhuza bundi byahagaritswe

source: Download all your time entries as CSV.
translation: Kuramo ibyanditswe byawe by'igihe byose nka CSV.

source: Warning: This entry is more than 7 days old.

translation: Ibyanditswe bishya (jya ku mugongo wihuse wo kongeraho)

source: Press H or Esc to close
translation: Kanda H cyangwa Esc kugirango ufunge

source: Work in focused sessions with timed breaks.
translation: Kora mu bikorwa by'umwete hamwe n'ibiruhuko bifite igihe.
